description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a cache on node_modules/. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a build job that runs npm install in the build stage. Add a test job that runs npm run test in the test stage. Add a release job in the deploy stage that only runs on tags, writes an .npmrc file with //registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN} and then publishes the package with npm publish --tag $NPM_TAG to the npm registry.
